title: Chapter 15
content:
Chapter 15: Dishes

The slap echoed harder in Denzel’s head than on his cheek.

For a couple seconds, he just stood there inside Aisha’s room...frozen

He raised his hands slowly and placed it around the cheek that got slapped

"What?"

He looked genuinely confused, not even angry...just confused because that wasn’t how it was supposed to turn out.

’What’s going on, I activated the skill and touched her...that’s the normal pattern isn’t it’

’So...why the hell did I get my self slapped!’

’If the skill had worked, why did she then react like that unless...did I just touch the wrong place?’

At this point even his own brain sounded stupid pretty stupid to him

After not resulting to an answer, Denzel walked out of the room and out of the house.

Eventually he walked down the street alone rubbing his cheek

Everything that had just transpired replayed in his head

Aisha rubbing on her thighs...her breathing

The look that she had in her eyes before the slap

And then...the slap itself

"Women are really terrifying" he muttered under his breath

He walked a little more before arriving at his own home.

’It’s already past bedtime, both Maria and Sophia should be asleep at this time’

’I missed my women at home just to get slapped by a saucy bitch. Really smart of you Denzel’

Surprisingly, the lights in the house were still on and the smell of food drifted outside the moment he opened the door to house

’The lights are still on and the smell of food...are they still awake?’

Denzel then stepped inside the house quietly and immediately noticed someone sitting on the dinning table with her head rested on it as if she was asleep

...it was Maria

The little noises Denzel made while entering the house, from opening the door to walking inside was enough to make Maria wake up

She lifted up her head and looked up at him the moment he entered and closed the door

"Denzel, you’re finally back! You had us so worried and you didn’t even tell us you were going to step out today, so we didn’t even know where to start looking" Maria said with worry clearly in her face as she stood up and walked towards Denzel

"I’m sorry mom, I went to look for a job like I told you yesterday. I didn’t expect to be out this late" Denzel said

As he was talking his eyes were locked in ons Maria’s massive tits protected from his sight by her loose night gown that was stretched out due to how massive her tits were

Every step she made as she walked towards Denzel made her tits sway left and right...Denzel couldn’t take his eyes off and his cock could stay dormant anymore

There was a bulge on his pants now

The moment he was done talking he was braced in a tight hug by Maria

It was the perfect type of hug

’Hehe’ he chuckled in his mind

Maria grabbed him by the head and pushed his head right between her boobs and held him tightly there

’Tits...hehe’ he chuckled more in his mind

Maria broke the contact after a while of embracing him

That was Denzel got himself back and glanced around the house...he hadn’t seen Sophia all day

"Mom, where is Sophia?" Denzel asked

Maria sighed softly as she grabbed a glass on the dining table and took a sip of water

"She already went to sleep. She tried staying up and waiting for you but her body eventually gave out to sleep" Maria replied him

"Oh, is that so...I haven’t seen her all day. I guess I’ll drop by her room before I go to bed" Denzel said

"That’s good...your dinner is on the table. Eat up so we can both go to bed" Maria spoke

His eyes slowly drifted back to Maria, who was already sitting at the table and he went and sat beside her

’Wait a minute...it’s just the both of us here and Sophia is asleep. That means...’ Denzel smiled as a wicked plan conjured in his mind

He sat there and started eating while thinking of a way to make this situation favour him.

For a while, he simply sat there eating while discussing how his day went casually with Maria. He made sure to leave out the part about Aisha slapping him because that would probably cause problems between the two women.

After eating, Maria naturally started gathering the dishes to get them washed

’I think this is the perfect opportunity to turn this situation to my favour’

’But I already used the skill and the cooldown is 2 damn hours. It’s just been barely an hour since I left Aisha’s place’

Denzel subconsciously opened up his status and it displayed right in front of him and only visible to him.

He looked down at the stimulation skill to get the details of the skill...that was when he saw it

[Skill: Stimulation]

[Mana Consumption: 5 mana per usage]

[Time Limit: 15 mins]

[Cooldown: 2 hours]

’The skill has no cooldown? What the hell...that can only mean one thing...’

’Stupid me forgot to activate the skill when I was with Aisha. Oh my, I’m so dumb’

’That was dumb of me but that just means I get to use the skill to capitalise on this opportunity presented to me tonight’

As soon as she picked it up, Denzel stood up immediately and walked towards the kitchen right behind her

"What do you mean?"

Maria said surprised as she turned and looked at Denzel. Her boobs swaying with her in the same direction as she turned

Denzel gulped, his dick throbbed

"I mean I’ll help with the dishes" Denzel replied

"Hm...that is very shocking but...sure. Help me rinse them" Maria spoke

The two of them walked into the kitchen together and washed the dishes side by side.

As Maria gave him the last plate, Denzel purposely outstretched his arm and let some foam and spread and fall on Maria’s boobs

"Ahh...Denzel, you clumsy kid. Look at what you did" staring at the soap foams on the outline of her cleavage

Denzel paused and let the moment stretch out a bit and then he moved his hand, his voice low and reassuring

"Oh...I’m sorry mom...my fault, let me get that off you"

He turned around and took a small towel from the door

He stretched his hands towards her massive tits to wipe out the foam but before he did, he muttered the phrase

’Yield’

[Stimulation skill is now in use]

[Countdown: 14mins 59secs]

As the notification popped up, Denzel’s hand moved downwards from the outline of her stained chest to the soft seductive curves of her tits.
